description: You are the president of the Flagstaff Astronomy Club planning a public Perseid meteor shower viewing event. Using the location data for the 'Flagstaff Dark Sky Site' (35.215°N, 111.633°W, altitude 2130m) from /home/ga/data/meteor_showers.json, set the observation time to August 13, 2024, at 09:00 UTC. The display must show constellation lines, constellation labels, and planet labels, with the atmosphere enabled and the ground disabled. Capture screenshots centered on the Moon and the radiant constellation Perseus. Document the event location, target date, radiant constellation, and an assessment of Moon interference in an observation plan file at /home/ga/Desktop/perseid_plan.txt.
